member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Send.AS4
member.summary: Task class for AS4 Send operations.

member.name: M:Frends.AS4.Send.AS4.Send(Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input,Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Options,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a file to a remote AS4 Message Service Handler (MSH) using the SOAP-with-Attachments (Multipart/Related) profile, with optional WS-Security signing and AES-256 encryption. The synchronous HTTP response is parsed, and the primary MIME attachment is extracted, optionally decrypted and decompressed. [Documentation](https://tasks.frends.com/tasks/CHANNEL/Frends.AS4.Send)
member.param: Required connection and routing parameters: file path, recipient URL, party IDs, AS4 collaboration info (Service, Action, ConversationId, AgreementRef), and certificate paths.
Behavioural flags: SignMessage, EncryptMessage, DecryptResponse, DecompressResponse, and ThrowErrorOnFailure.
A cancellation token provided by the Frends Platform.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Error
member.summary: Error information returned when the AS4 Send task encounters a failure.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Error.Message
member.summary: Human-readable summary of the error.
member.example: Failed to send AS4 message: Connection refused.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Error.AdditionalInfo
member.summary: The underlying exception providing stack trace and inner exception details.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input
member.summary: Input parameters for the AS4 Send task.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.FilePath
member.summary: Full path to the file to be sent as the AS4 payload attachment.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.RecipientUrl
member.summary: The HTTP(S) endpoint URL of the AS4 receiving MSH.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.SenderPartyId
member.summary: AS4 party identifier for the sender (From party).

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.RecipientPartyId
member.summary: AS4 party identifier for the recipient (To party).

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.Service
member.summary: AS4 collaboration service value included in the eb:CollaborationInfo header.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.Action
member.summary: AS4 action value included in the eb:CollaborationInfo header.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.ConversationId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the AS4 conversation. Must be consistent across all messages in the same exchange.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.AgreementRef
member.summary: Optional reference to the P-Mode agreement governing this message exchange. Leave empty if not required by the receiving MSH.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.SenderCertificatePath
member.summary: File system path to the PFX (PKCS#12) certificate used to sign the outgoing message.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.SenderCertificatePassword
member.summary: Password protecting the sender PFX certificate file.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.RecipientCertificatePath
member.summary: File system path to the recipient's public X.509 certificate (.cer/.crt) used to encrypt the outgoing payload.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.ResponseDecryptionCertificatePath
member.summary: Optional path to a PFX certificate used to decrypt the response payload. Defaults to the sender certificate when left empty.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input.ResponseDecryptionCertificatePassword
member.summary: Password for the response decryption certificate. Required only when a separate response decryption certificate path is provided.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Options
member.summary: Additional options controlling the AS4 Send task behaviour.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Options.SignMessage
member.summary: When true, the outgoing SOAP message will be signed using the sender certificate with RSA-SHA256 and an XML Digital Signature in the WS-Security header.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Options.EncryptMessage
member.summary: When true, the payload attachment will be encrypted using AES-256-CBC with the session key wrapped by the recipient certificate (RSA-OAEP).

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Options.DecryptResponse
member.summary: When true, the task will attempt to decrypt the response payload using the response decryption certificate (or the sender certificate if not provided).

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Options.DecompressResponse
P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Options.ThrowErrorOnFailure
member.summary: When true, any exception during task execution is re-thrown and propagates to the Frends process. When false, the exception is captured in the Result.Error property and Result.Success is set to false.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Options.ErrorMessageOnFailure
member.summary: Overrides the error message returned or thrown on failure. When empty, the original exception message is used.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Result
member.summary: Result returned by the AS4 Send task after processing the synchronous response.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Result.Success
member.summary: Indicates whether the task completed successfully, including sending the request and processing the response payload.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Result.PayloadString
member.summary: The processed response payload decoded as a UTF-8 string. Null when the response contains no payload part or when Success is false.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Result.PayloadBytes
member.summary: The raw bytes of the processed response payload after any decryption and decompression. Null when the response contains no payload part or when Success is false.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Result.ResponseHeaders
member.summary: HTTP response headers returned by the receiving MSH, keyed by header name.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Result.Error
member.summary: Error information populated when Success is false. Null on successful completion.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Send.Helpers.As4MessageBuilder
member.summary: Builds an AS4-compliant Multipart/Related SOAP-with-Attachments message, with optional WS-Security signing and payload encryption.

member.name: M:Frends.AS4.Send.Helpers.As4MessageBuilder.Build(System.Byte[],System.String,Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Input,Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Options,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2)
member.summary: Builds the complete MimeMessage ready to be serialised as the HTTP request body.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Send.Helpers.As4ResponseParser
member.summary: Parses the synchronous AS4 HTTP response, extracts the primary payload attachment, and applies optional decryption and decompression.

member.name: M:Frends.AS4.Send.Helpers.As4ResponseParser.ParseAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage,Frends.AS4.Send.Definitions.Options,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads the HTTP response, extracts headers, and processes the MIME payload.

member.name: M:Frends.AS4.Send.Helpers.As4ResponseParser.TryDecryptWithCert(System.Byte[],System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2)
member.summary: Attempts to decrypt data where the first rsaKeyLength bytes are the RSA-OAEP-wrapped AES key and the remaining bytes are [16-byte IV][AES-CBC ciphertext].
